name: FMC Corporation
description: FMC Corporation is a global agricultural sciences company dedicated to helping growers produce food, feed, fiber, and fuel for an expanding world population while adapting to a changing environment. FMC's innovative crop protection solutions—including biologicals, crop nutrition, digital and precision agriculture—enable growers, crop advisers, and turf and pest management professionals to address their toughest challenges economically without compromising safety or the environment.
